title: MCP Server
description: Run FlyEnv as an MCP Server so AI coding tools (Claude Code, Cursor, Cline, ...) can read your local environment and control services.
autoStartTip: Start the MCP Server automatically when FlyEnv launches.
independentServiceTip: When enabled, group start/stop will skip the MCP Server.
allowRemoteTip: When off, the server only listens on 127.0.0.1. Turning this on exposes FlyEnv control to your network — use with caution.
allowRemoteWarning: This will allow non-loopback clients on your network to control FlyEnv via MCP. Only enable it if you understand the risk.
addToClientTip: Register this FlyEnv MCP Server into the selected AI CLI's MCP list.
configHint: Paste the snippet below into your AI client's MCP configuration.
stdioConfigHint: Paste the snippet below into clients that support stdio MCP servers (Cursor, Cline, Windsurf, Claude Desktop, ...).
stdioConfigTip: Make sure FlyEnv is running; the bridge script forwards stdio messages to the FlyEnv MCP HTTP endpoint.
approvalTip: Confirm shows a native dialog before executing the tool.
riskyTip: Service control tools can change your running environment. Keep only the tools you trust enabled.

toolDescriptions.list_services: List FlyEnv-managed modules with installed versions and running state.
toolDescriptions.service_status: Get installed versions and running state for one FlyEnv module.
toolDescriptions.list_sites: List FlyEnv-managed local development sites and their metadata.
toolDescriptions.get_database_connection_info: Return connection details for a FlyEnv-managed local database or cache service.
toolDescriptions.resolve_site_runtime: Resolve a FlyEnv site to runtime details such as root path, web server, and PHP/runtime selection.
toolDescriptions.get_service_exec_info: Return executable, config, and runtime details for one installed FlyEnv module version.
toolDescriptions.resolve_site_urls: Return the canonical URLs, aliases, SSL entrypoints, and reverse proxy URLs for a FlyEnv site.
toolDescriptions.get_managed_file_map: Return FlyEnv-managed env, config, log, cert, runtime, and data file paths for a site or service.
toolDescriptions.list_log_files: List known log files for one FlyEnv module.
toolDescriptions.list_config_files: List known config files for one FlyEnv module.
toolDescriptions.list_online_versions: List downloadable versions for an installable FlyEnv module.
toolDescriptions.start_service: Start an installed long-running FlyEnv service version.
toolDescriptions.stop_service: Stop a running long-running FlyEnv service.
toolDescriptions.restart_service: Restart a running long-running FlyEnv service.
toolDescriptions.create_site: Create a new FlyEnv local development site.
toolDescriptions.update_site: Update an existing FlyEnv local development site.
toolDescriptions.delete_site: Delete a FlyEnv local development site from FlyEnv configuration.
toolDescriptions.install_service: Download and install a version for an installable FlyEnv module.
